title: Sony Bank gets US regulator nod to issue stablecoins
summary: Sony Bank received preliminary approval from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to establish a US stablecoin issuance business, with $40 million in starting capital.

title: Interpol operation exposes $122M crypto wallet tied to romance scam laundering
summary: Interpol said a suspect's crypto wallet processed over $122.5 million in 10 months as authorities uncovered the scheme during a global anti-fraud operation that led to 5,811 arrests.

title: European Gas Swings as Hormuz Tensions Cloud Supply Outlook
summary: European natural gas prices fluctuated as fresh hostilities between the US and Iran threaten a recovery of flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Modi Strengthens Indo-Pacific Alliances
summary: Australia has agreed to supply uranium to India after more than a decade of talks, during Prime Minister Narendra Modi's visit to Melbourne. The deal follows defense agreements in Indonesia as India deepens its Indo-Pacific partnerships. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin Slips to $62,000, Paring Rebound as CryptoQuant Sees Room Higher

Bitcoin Slips to $62,000, Paring Rebound as CryptoQuant Sees Room Higher

title: CFTC Chair Says Clarity Act Is ‘So Close’ As August Deadline Nears
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

CFTC Chair Says Clarity Act Is ‘So Close’ As August Deadline Nears
CFTC Chairman Michael Selig urged Congress to pass the Clarity Act before the August recess, saying the crypto market-structure bill is "so close" despite ongoing disputes over ethics and stablecoin provisions.

title: Sony Bank Clears OCC Hurdle for Dollar Stablecoin
summary: The lender's new US subsidiary, Connectia Trust, would issue a dollar-pegged stablecoin once it clears the regulator's final conditions.

title: A 20-Year-Old's Crypto Wallet Moved $123M in Romance-Scam Cash: Interpol Says
summary: The two Thai arrests were part of Operation First Light, a 97-country sweep that logged 5,811 arrests and intercepted $293 million.

title: CFTC Chair Selig warns regulators will end up ‘writing all the rules’ for crypto if Clarity Act stalls
summary: CFTC Chair Michael Selig warned regulators may end up writing crypto rules if Congress fails to pass the Clarity Act.

title: BitGo introduces quantum protection for institutional Bitcoin wallets
summary: Some experts have argued the greater risks posed by quantum computing revolve around a failure to implement new technology.

title: US carries out second day of strikes against Iran
summary: Trump claims Tehran ‘called’ to negotiate but casts doubt on prospects of deal

title: Iran’s new order takes shape after Khamenei burial
summary: Ali Khamenei’s funeral leaves son Mojtaba — about whom Iranians know little — to confront enormous challenges facing the regime
